dependencies.name: requests
dependencies.mediation: DIRECT DEP pinned by constraints.txt. pyproject.toml declares `requests = ">=2.0"` (wide range), constraints.txt declares `requests==2.30.0`. poetry.lock (committed) shows requests at the latest 2.32.x because Poetry does NOT read constraints.txt natively. Mend applies the constraint independently of the lockfile.

summary.constraint_applied: requests==2.30.0 via constraints.txt (DIRECT dep, overlaid on Poetry-resolved tree)
summary.notes: Direct-dep constraint axis. poetry.lock diverges from scan output at requests (lock=2.32.x, scan=2.30.0).
